description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a whimsical, fantasy-inspired appearance, featuring a pointed hat and a short, buttoned coat with a high collar. The child has short, tousled hair and large, expressive eyes, giving a youthful and animated look. A distinctive wind-up key is attached to the child's back, suggesting a toy or automaton theme. The figure wears mismatched socks and simple shoes, adding to its playful and imaginative character. The arms are extended horizontally, and the overall proportions are childlike, with a slightly oversized head and slender limbs. The surface finish is matte, with smooth, softly contoured features and no visible sharp edges.
description: A whimsical child figure with a pointed hat, buttoned coat, and a wind-up key on its back, styled with playful, mismatched socks and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, pointed hat, buttoned coat, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wind-up key protruding from the back and the profile of the hat and coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, coat, and the full wind-up key mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wind-up key and the side profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve buttoned coat with high collar and shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
